title: Useful Bamboo
body:
Make bamboo more useful!

### Crafting:  
3 bamboo -> 2 paper  
![bamboo->paper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c24327bc631c65e31c0a570790b98c08f85ded4.png)

### Smelting:  
bamboo block -> charcoal  
![bambooblock->charcoal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2336b83963b7b433d59605f74539503158a7051.png)  
stripped bamboo block -> charcoal  
![strippedbambooblock->charcoal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1714f448d5200df9deb1ceacc8067a0037ba916b.png)

Bamboo is now **compostable** with 30% chance
